title: DOM and CSS Debugging Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on browser-based UI debugging.

questions.question: Regarding web development, what is its primary role in 'DOM and CSS Debugging'?
options: To identify and fix styling and layout issues by inspecting and modifying a project's DOM and CSS directly in the browser

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of editing your application's CSS directly in the browser?
options: Seeing precisely how those changes affect your project's appearance in real-time
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
